actions.description: Fifteenth board meeting. Pac-Man launched — 6 games live, 9 clean QA cycles. Pipeline fully drained: no games in research/pitch/spec. R&D flagged to begin new game research. UX/UI loading states shipped, needs next initiative. 15 naming violations stalled, CEO escalation recommended.

nextStep: Next meeting: check R&D new game research, UX/UI next initiative, naming violation resolution.
